el: Mobile browsers can't open WeChat Pay directly. Copy the payment link below and open it inside WeChat to continue.
en: Mobile browsers can't open WeChat Pay directly. Copy the payment link below and open it inside WeChat to continue.
zh: 当前浏览器不支持直接调用微信支付。请复制下方链接，在微信中打开后继续完成支付。

el: Guide shown to users on a mobile browser outside WeChat, where H5 WeChat Pay is unavailable.
en: Guide shown to users on a mobile browser outside WeChat, where H5 WeChat Pay is unavailable.
zh: 在非微信的移动端浏览器中显示的引导文案。

el: Copy payment link
en: Copy payment link
zh: 复制支付链接

el: Label for the button that copies the current page URL so the user can paste it inside WeChat.
en: Label for the button that copies the current page URL so the user can paste it inside WeChat.
zh: 复制当前页面 URL 到剪贴板的按钮文案，便于用户粘贴到微信。

el: After copying, open WeChat, paste the link into any chat or the search bar, and tap it to complete payment.
en: After copying, open WeChat, paste the link into any chat or the search bar, and tap it to complete payment.
zh: 复制成功后，打开微信，将链接粘贴到任意聊天框或顶部搜索框，点击链接即可完成支付。

el: Secondary hint shown beneath the copy-link button to guide users through pasting the link inside WeChat.
en: Secondary hint shown beneath the copy-link button to guide users through pasting the link inside WeChat.
zh: 复制链接按钮下方的二级引导提示。

el: Message while the Apple in-app purchase is processing.
en: Message while the Apple in-app purchase is processing.
zh: Apple 内购处理中的消息。

el: Message when the Apple in-app purchase fails.
en: Message when the Apple in-app purchase fails.
zh: Apple 内购失败的消息。

el: Message when Apple in-app purchase is unavailable for the package.
en: Message when Apple in-app purchase is unavailable for the package.
zh: Apple 内购不可用的消息。

el: QR Code
en: QR Code
zh: 二维码

el: Tip shown above the Native QR on mobile-WeChat. The user long-presses to recognise the `weixin://wxpay/bizpayurl` URL and pays without leaving WeChat.
en: Tip shown above the Native QR on mobile-WeChat. The user long-presses to recognise the `weixin://wxpay/bizpayurl` URL and pays without leaving WeChat.
zh: 手机微信内部浏览器打开订单页时，二维码上方的引导文案。用户长按二维码即可识别并完成支付，无需跳出微信。

el: Total Orders
en: Total Orders
zh: 订单总数

el: Summary card: total number of orders matching the current filters.
en: Summary card: total number of orders matching the current filters.
zh: 汇总卡片：当前筛选条件下的订单总数。

el: Total Spent
en: Total Spent
zh: 总消费

el: Summary card: total amount spent across matching orders.
en: Summary card: total amount spent across matching orders.
zh: 汇总卡片：当前筛选条件下订单总金额。

el: Finished Orders
en: Finished Orders
zh: 已完成订单

el: Summary card: number of finished orders.
en: Summary card: number of finished orders.
zh: 汇总卡片：已完成的订单数。

el: Pending Orders
en: Pending Orders
zh: 待支付订单

el: Summary card: number of pending orders.
en: Summary card: number of pending orders.
zh: 汇总卡片：待支付的订单数。

el: Export CSV
en: Export CSV
zh: 导出 CSV

el: Button label to export the filtered orders as CSV.
en: Button label to export the filtered orders as CSV.
zh: 按钮文案：按当前筛选条件导出订单 CSV。

el: All States
en: All States
zh: 全部状态

el: Placeholder of the state filter dropdown indicating no specific state is selected.
en: Placeholder of the state filter dropdown indicating no specific state is selected.
zh: 状态筛选下拉的占位符：表示不限定状态。

el: All Payment Methods
en: All Payment Methods
zh: 全部支付方式

el: Placeholder of the payment method filter dropdown indicating no specific method is selected.
en: Placeholder of the payment method filter dropdown indicating no specific method is selected.
zh: 支付方式筛选下拉的占位符：表示不限定支付方式。
